tools.name: swarmy_init
tools.description: Initialize a Swarmy run for an explicit local repository path. Swarmy canonicalizes repo/db paths, rejects unsafe .swarmy metadata symlinks, and treats db as a local file path supplied by the caller.

repo.description: Local repository path to initialize; canonicalized before metadata is written

db.description: Optional local SQLite path; relative values resolve under repo and symlinked DB files are rejected

tools.name: swarmy_agent
tools.description: Record or update an agent in the caller-selected local Swarmy store. metadata_json is untrusted JSON and is parsed before persistence.

repo.description: Local repository path; canonicalized before loading run metadata

metadata_json.description: Untrusted JSON object string; invalid JSON returns a typed tool error

tools.name: swarmy_stage
tools.description: Set a bead's Swarmy stage in the caller-selected local Swarmy store. Stage names and payload_json are validated before persistence.

repo.description: Local repository path; canonicalized before loading run metadata

stage.description: One of coding, validation, review, merge, blocked, or complete

payload_json.description: Untrusted JSON object string; invalid JSON returns a typed tool error

tools.name: swarmy_snapshot
tools.description: Fetch the current persisted Swarmy snapshot from a caller-selected local repository. The repo path is canonicalized and missing stores are reported without creating files.

repo.description: Local repository path; canonicalized before metadata and store reads
